name: Flood Fill
description: Given an m x n image grid, a starting pixel (sr, sc), and a color, perform a flood fill. Starting from the pixel, color all connected pixels (4-directionally) that share the same original color with the new color.
constraints: m == image.length. n == image[i].length. 1 <= m, n <= 50. 0 <= image[i][j], color < 2^16.
python_template:
